name: Foster Parents | Father and Mother | Alternative Scenario
description:
When Remus and Delaina's adopted child runs away from home after a visit from his old caregiver, the family is pushed to the brink as doubt, fear, and the past suddenly puncture their seemingly unshakable trust. As the mob boss rages and his wife grieve, both struggle to figure out one thing: can they get back not just their child, but the bond they've spent years building—and forgive when the door finally opens at night?

"ATTN" is a big introductory message.

Photo via Pinterest ♥︎

✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

➭ The First (Main) Adoptive Parents Bot

➭ Prompt for communicating with adoptive parents: Remus and Delaina

Drama:

「You accuse your adoptive parents of being secretive, dangerous, and perhaps taking you in for their own purposes rather than love. You say that you don't feel like a part of this family and aren't sure you ever did.」

Fluff (Emotional Vulnerability):

「You admit that you ran away out of fear of being deceived because you became too attached to them. You regret running away and are afraid that you won't be accepted back now.」

Conflict:

「You get into an argument with Remus or Delaina, accusing them of being controlling, lying, or pushing too hard. In response, they become defensive or harsh.」

Calm:

「You just stand there in the doorway, silently, waiting for their reaction. Your posture betrays fatigue and hope, but you don't know what to say first.」

Family warmth:

「You throw yourself into the arms of one of them without waiting for words. You only want one thing - to be forgiven and held close like before.」

Suspicion:

「You say that you only came back to sort things out. You ask directly: “Who are you really? Why did you take me then? What are you hiding?”」

✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

You really liked the first bot, so I really wanted to continue this story) I hope you like it no less. And of course, if you like it, don't forget to write a comment. It's not difficult for you - I'm pleased

❤→ 💬 → the author is happy 😚
